data.name: CanNotBeDeleted.Text
data.value: Only super user can delete a video that is being encoded.

data.name: TopItemConfirm.Text
data.value: Are you sure you wish to move this item to top?

data.name: ManagersOnly.Text
data.value: Only video managers can use this module.

data.name: EncodingURL.Help
data.value: UVG sends an HTTP request every few minutes to [ENCODINGURL], which picks the first video in queue and encode it, if the URL does not work, choose another alias in UVG_Setup module.

data.name: ElasticTranscoder.Help
data.value: Amazon Elastic Transcoder is enabled, videos in this queue will be uploaded to Amazon and encoded by Elastic Transcoder service.

data.name: TooManyAttempts.Text
data.value: UVG has attempted to encode the first item in this queue for [ATTEMPTS] times, you may need to adjust executionTimeout setting in your web.config and your IIS recycle settings to make sure UVG is able to fully encode it before it times out and recycles.
